generated_oml:
instance Joint1InputCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor measuring input current for robot joint 1 in precision machining process"
    DTDFVocab:producedData Joint1InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance Joint1AngularVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor measuring angular velocity of robot joint 1"
    DTDFVocab:producedData Joint1AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
]

instance Joint1PositionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical sensor measuring position of robot joint 1 first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData Joint1PositionDataTransmitted
]

instance Joint1InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Joint1InputCurrentSensor
    base:desc "JSON-formatted input current data transmitted over MQTT protocol with hierarchical topics"
]

instance Joint1AngularVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Joint1AngularVelocitySensor
    base:desc "JSON-formatted angular velocity data transmitted over MQTT protocol with hierarchical topics"
]

instance Joint1PositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Joint1PositionSensor
    base:desc "JSON-formatted position data transmitted over MQTT protocol with hierarchical topics"
]

instance Joint1InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw input current data from robot joint 1 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData Joint1InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo LowPassFilterEnabler
]

instance Joint1AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw angular velocity data from robot joint 1 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData Joint1AngularVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionCompensationEnabler
]

instance Joint1PositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw position data from robot joint 1 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData Joint1PositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionCompensationEnabler
]

instance FilteredJoint1InputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Low-pass filtered input current data for robot joint 1"
    DTDFVocab:fromData Joint1InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionCompensationEnabler
]

instance LowPassFilterEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Applies low-pass filter to input current data to remove noise"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionCompensationService
]

instance FrictionCompensationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time adaptive friction compensation using physics-based and data-driven models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionCompensationService
]

instance SimulinkPhysicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Physics-based dynamic simulation model using Simulink for capturing nonlinear friction phenomena"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionCompensationEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance NeuralNetworkModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data-driven machine learning model (neural network) for capturing nonlinear friction phenomena"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveMaintenanceEnabler
]

instance SysMLSystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML model for system structure, properties, and behavior across abstraction levels"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionCompensationEnabler, PredictiveMaintenanceEnabler
]

instance AADLArchitectureModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AADL architecture description model for system components and interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SystemModelingEnabler
]

instance MontiArcComponentModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MontiArc component and connector modeling for system architecture"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ComponentModelingEnabler
]

instance DigitalShadowReferenceModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "UML class diagram reference model for conformance of digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ConformanceEnabler
]

instance FrictionCompensationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time adaptive friction compensation for robot joints to maintain positioning accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides PositioningAccuracyInsight
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance through anomaly detection in friction behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetectionInsight
]

instance SimulationOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation-based optimization of cutting parameters to reduce CO2 emissions"
    DTDFVocab:provides CO2ReductionInsight
]

instance ProductQualityPredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Product quality prediction from production data"
    DTDFVocab:provides QualityPredictionInsight
]

instance DataStorageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Stores and visualizes measured, simulated, and reference values in Thingsboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight
]

instance PositioningAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Maintains positioning accuracy through adaptive friction compensation"
]

instance AnomalyDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detects anomalies in friction behavior for predictive maintenance"
]

instance CO2ReductionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Reduces CO2 emissions through optimized cutting parameters"
]

instance QualityPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicts product quality based on production data"
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualizes digital shadow data for monitoring and analysis"
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables anomaly detection in friction behavior for predictive maintenance"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulates system behavior for optimization of cutting parameters"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationOptimizationService
]

instance QualityPredictionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables product quality prediction from production data"
    DTDFVocab:enables ProductQualityPredictionService
]

instance AASExecutorEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell Executor processes and populates measured, simulated, and reference values into Thingsboard"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance ThingsboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Thingsboard platform for digital shadow data storage and visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStorageService
]

instance SystemModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [

    DTDFVocab:enables SystemModelingService
]

instance ArchitectureModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AADL-based architecture modeling for system components"
    DTDFVocab:enables ArchitectureModelingService
]

instance ComponentModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MontiArc-based component and connector modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComponentModelingService
]

instance ConformanceEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Ensures conformance to Digital Shadow Reference Model standards"
    DTDFVocab:enables ConformanceService
]

    base:desc "Custom C++/Java processing logic for specific data handling"
    DTDFVocab:enables CustomProcessingService
]

]

instance MechanicalJointComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Mechanical joint component in robotic manufacturing system for precision machining"
]

instance RealTimeControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Real-time control system for robot joint operation"
]

instance MachiningToolingInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Machining tooling interface for precision machining processes"
]

instance ManufacturingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [

    base:contains MechanicalJointComponent, RealTimeControlSystem, MachiningToolingInterface

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with dead time constraints in the control system for dynamic adaptation of physics-based and data-driven friction models as operating conditions change, supported by MQTT and ThingsBoard for data flow."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration through Asset Administration Shell (AAS) integrating SysML structural models, Simulink behavioral models via FMI, and MQTT for data flow, with ThingsBoard for real-time visualization and monitoring."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model reliability depends on traceability and verification of transformations between modeling languages (e.g., SysML to simulation models). Uncertainty sources like wear, temperature changes, and varying payloads are mitigated through dynamic parameter updates and neural network retraining using real-time data. Anomaly detection in friction behavior supports predictive maintenance, ensuring high precision in positioning and process quality."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system employs MQTT protocol with a publish-subscribe architecture for network communication, where data is transmitted as JSON over hierarchically structured topics with configurable read/write permissions for user access control. No specific bandwidth or latency requirements are documented."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration via Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for Industry 4.0 interoperability, utilizing MQTT for IoT data exchange with ThingsBoard, and supporting multi-domain modeling through SysML and Simulink via FMI to interface with external systems such as production planning and CNC diagnostics."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system utilizes standardized modeling languages such as SysML for systems engineering, AADL (SAE standard) for architecture description, and ACME for component-based system modeling. These standards support structured representation of components, interfaces, and behaviors across multiple abstraction levels and enable integration with simulation tools like Simulink."
]
